title: ForgeRock Session
description: An authenticated session in ForgeRock Access Management. Sessions are created upon successful authentication and tracked via SSO tokens (iPlanetDirectoryPro cookies).

tokenId.description: The SSO token identifier for this session

universalId.description: Universal identifier for the session owner (e.g., id=user,ou=user,dc=example,dc=com)

realm.description: The realm in which the session was created

latestAccessTime.description: Most recent time the session was accessed

maxIdleExpirationTime.description: Time at which the session will expire due to inactivity

maxSessionExpirationTime.description: Absolute maximum session expiration time regardless of activity

valid.description: Whether the session is currently valid
